steps.t: The shrews and feed bags can be found near Gerard Deephole on Northcotton Farm. Gerard Deephole asked you to gather the feed bags and drive off the sh…
The troughs are at the animal pens on Northcotton Farm. The feed needs to be placed in the feeding troughs for the cows.
Gerard Deephole is at the animal pens on Northcotton Farm. Gerard Deephole will be pleased to hear the troughs have been filled.
